source_pr.title: executor: skip TestMemCount test case to make race test more stable
source_pr.body: ### What problem does this PR solve? Problem Summary: https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/pull/18901 add a test that will block a long time under go's race check and it makes all PR fail ![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/528332/91541506-0abbf600-e94f-11ea-8145-f08cbd7f4191.png) ### What is changed and how it works? What's Changed, How it Works: skip it when race open ### Related changes - n/a ### Check List Tests - Unit test Side effects - n/a ### Release note - No release note --- This change is [](https://reviewable.io/reviews/pingcap/tidb/19578)

symptoms: `TestMemCount` could block for a very long time under `-race`, causing CI timeouts; this PR quarantines it by skipping under race.
failure_signature: Quarantine-only: `TestMemCount` is skipped under `-race` due to very long runtime / potential timeout
root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: This change only quarantines the flakiness by skipping `TestMemCount` when `-race` is enabled because the test can run extremely slowly and trigger CI timeouts. There is no targeted stabilization/root-cause fix in the patch beyond skipping, so we classify as insufficient evidence.
fix_pattern: N/A (insufficient evidence; no targeted stabilization change identified).

evidence: evidence: PR title: skip TestMemCount test case to make race test more stable.
evidence: skips/guards long-running memory-count test under race detector to avoid CI flakes (executor/aggfuncs/func_count_test.go).
